case_title: BAKER PLACES, INC. A CALIF NOT-FOR-PROFIT CORP. vs. GIPSON, SAMUEL et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE BALLATI, D.PADILLA/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 12:40PM CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. STEVEN MACDONALD FOR THE PLTF AND THE DEFT SAMUEL GIBSON IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.
DEFT ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE DENIED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIPSON, SAMUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1375 GROVE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-20-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
